raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislators urged President Trump to prioritize public safety while advancing immigration and visa policies.",
    "The letter stated that they fully support efforts to identify, detain, and deport undocumented violent criminals.",
    "Recent immigration raids have created widespread fear among workers, impacting their attendance at work.",
    "The lawmakers called for the modernization of the immigration process to provide a path towards legal status for non-criminal undocumented immigrants.",
    "The legislators requested the expansion of the H-2A and H-2B visa programs to authorize more legal guest workers.",
    "The letter stated that America needs an immigration system that reflects both compassion and lawfulness.",
    "National policies from 2021 to 2024 led to over ten million illegal immigrants entering the United States, overwhelming states and local governments."
  ]
}
```
